summary: I'm Jamie—a curious, people-loving (97% extrovert!) People Operations professional who thrives on solving problems through data analysis, developing programs grounded in evidence, and collaborating with stakeholders for sustainable impact. Expect me to always be seeking ways we can improve the people and workplace experience—through human-centered, systematic approaches.

bullets.text: Upskill HR team in {data|data analytics} to audit 300+ leave cases, successfully refuting cost assumptions via {data|evidence-based insights}
Empower HR to present executive-ready insights on $362K in leave costs, leading to policy redesigns and first aid training
Run {coord|onboarding logistics, system setup, and Day-1 readiness}, establishing processes for 70+ staff and reducing onboarding time by 75%
Maintain {tools|SOPs, process documentation, and internal wiki (Notion)}, keeping data clean and audit-ready across 20+ programs
Identify repetitive workflows and {tools|apply AI tools} to automate them, partnering across {cross|Marketing, Tech, and Sales teams}
Coordinate {prog|events and program logistics} including vendor management, scheduling, and follow-up for 600+ participants
Improved {ex|employee experience} via 5 {cross|cross-functional} projects focusing on rewards & recognition, engagement, and L&D
Analyzed 2,000+ employee experiences to amplify employee voice and guide C-suite decisions on satisfaction drivers
Led a manager effectiveness initiative, transforming {data|feedback data} into actionable reports that informed engagement strategies
Provided consultations to improve strategic plans and internal training on DEI, Inclusive Leadership, and performance review
Optimized onboarding processes for new hires across 3 global locations by conducting process analysis and clarifying job responsibilities
Delivered HR operations support across employee relations, headcount, and benefits-related coordination for senior leaders
Supported HRBP team by piloting an Inclusive Leadership workshop for senior leaders, later scaled to 23 global locations
Strengthened {ex|engagement} via an HR newsletter and award-winning well-being initiatives, recognized among 1,000+ competitors
Developed proficiency across HR functions, ranging from recruitment and compensation to performance management
Coordinated job postings, scheduling, and HR logistics for a challenging international role
Provided responsive, customer-service-oriented support via personalized communication, increasing applications by 566% in 2 months
Organized recruiting events and moderated panels with C-suite at top 3 universities, reaching 230+ students and 80+ applicants
